data.title: Purple Innovation Extends Maturity of Debt and Reschedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, on March 24, 2026, Purple Innovation, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRPL), a leading comfort innovation firm known for its mattresses aiming to provide "less pain, better sleep," revealed the extension of its debt maturity from December 31, 2026, to April 30, 2027.

data.title: OpenAI discontinues AI video app Sora after 6 months; CEO Sam Altman announces shutdown of text-to-video models, Disney's $1B investment axed.
data.description: According to reports, the CEO of OpenAI, Sam Altman, has announced that all of the organization's text-to-video models will be shut down. Additionally, a significant $1 billion investment from Disney has been called off as well.

data.title: Blaize Holdings Is Trending As Stock Shoots Up 49% Overnight: Here's Why
data.description: Shares of Blaize Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: BZAI) experienced a surge on Tuesday evening, with a notable 48.65% increase to $1.65 after reporting their financial results. The California-based AI platform company shared its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, along with fiscal 2026 guidance forecasting $130 million in revenue. In the fourth quarter, the company posted a net loss of $3.2 million, a significant improvement from the prior quarter's loss of $26.3 million. Revenue for the quarter more than doubled compared to the third quarter and exceeded the company's expectations. The adjusted EBITDA showed a consistent loss of $11.1 million compared to the previous quarter. Blaize Holdings highlighted that research and development, sales, general, and administrative expenses stayed stable quarter over quarter. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: US-Iran Peace Talks To Be Held In This Country? Crypto Prediction Market Sets Over 50% Probability After Trump's Truth Social Post
data.description: There is a growing confidence among cryptocurrency investors that Islamabad may be chosen as the location for U.S.-Iran negotiations following President Donald Trump's endorsement of the Pakistani Prime Minister's offer to mediate. According to Polymarket on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), there is a 56% probability that the next diplomatic meeting between the U.S. and Iran will occur in Pakistan. This likelihood has increased by 33 percentage points in the last 24 hours. The criteria for this meeting include it being conducted in person, potentially involving indirect face-to-face interactions, and being publicly acknowledged by the government or credible media sources. Meetings facilitated through intermediaries are excluded. For the complete article, please visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Develops Edge Digital Twin Technology for Real-time Compensation of Errors in CNC Machine Tools
data.description: In a recent announcement from Mitsubishi Electric Corporation, it was revealed that they, in partnership with RWTH Aachen University, have successfully created a cutting-edge technology. This innovative technology utilizes a digital twin to promptly rectify machine-tool errors in real-time on CNC-equipped machine tools. Through rigorous testing, it was demonstrated that this groundbreaking technology has the potential to diminish errors stemming from minor deformation in machined components caused by cutting tool force by an impressive 50%. This advancement is pivotal in significantly reducing inaccuracies during machining processes.

data.title: Akeso Advances "IO 2.0 + ADC 2.0" Strategy with Phase II Initiation of Novel ADCs Combined with Ivonescimab and Cadonilimab
data.description: Today, Akeso, Inc. (Stock Symbol: 9926.HK) disclosed that it has obtained approval from the Center for Drug Evaluation (CDE) under China's National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) to commence Phase II clinical studies for AK146D1 in Hong Kong on March 24, 2026.

The White House has issued an executive order continuing the Federal Emergency Management Agency Review Council to maintain oversight and evaluation efforts.

data.title: From SCAN to SPARK: Galaxy Brain Scientific Enables a New Paradigm in Non-invasive, Personalized Precision Treatment for Parkinson's Disease
data.description: On March 24, 2026, a study led by Prof. Hesheng Liu from Galaxy Brain Scientific Inc. revealed in Nature Neuroscience that Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) is effective in treating Parkinson's disease. This research marks a significant step forward in understanding and managing the condition.
